title: Simplilearn South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Simplilearn South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn South Asia Partners in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn South Asia Partners:
Simplilearn South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn South Asia Partners!
